productDisplayName: Batman Men Crew Neck Green T-shirt
description: Style NoteSpun from irresistibly soft cotton, this blissfully cosy T-shirt from batman follows our favourite trend - graphic tees! Sporting print on the chest, this tee gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer uniform. Style it with checked shorts, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalance.Product DetailsGreen crew neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separatelyDo not bleach, do not dry clean, do not tumble dryWarm iron, iron print on reverseSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6&rdquo and shoulder 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size 44
